description: A fan engagement coordinator needs to create and send the monthly fan club newsletter.

nodes.task_description: Gather content for the newsletter, such as recent news, upcoming events, and a player spotlight.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent compiles all the necessary content.

nodes.task_description: Populate the newsletter template with the content.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates the final version of the newsletter.

nodes.task_description: Send the newsletter to all registered fan club members.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully sends the email to all members.
